title: Add persistent recall store boundary
goal: Design and implement an optional append-only operator recall store with retention, dedupe and export semantics while preserving evidence refs and non-claims.

metadata.source: deferred from PR #116; current PR exports on demand only
metadata.non_goal: Does not create free-form chat memory, automatic task completion or policy oracle behavior.

acceptance.assertion: Recall store writes are append-only or versioned with hash-bound records and cannot overwrite evidence history silently.
Duplicate recall items are detected by stable hash over source/evidence/topic/learned_rule without losing provenance.
Retention and export limits are explicit and visible in status/output.
Stored recall cannot authorize merges, recovery actions, routing changes or Bureau task completion.
Focused tests cover append, duplicate, corrupt record, bounded export and no-free-form-memory rejection.
